UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Information about the user and their assigned role.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The role of the user, either owner (admin) or seller (staff).

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

Sale.title: Sale Record
Sale.description: A record of a transaction made by a seller.

/users/{userId}.description: User profile document. Only the user with a UID matching the document ID can read their own profile. This document dictates if they see the Owner or Seller view.

/sales/{saleId}.description: Sales records. Any authenticated user can create a sale. Only users whose UserProfile document has role 'owner' can read the full collection of sales.

/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Expense records. Any authenticated user can create an expense record. Only users whose UserProfile document has role 'owner' can read the full collection of expenses.
